prestazioni: Engine swap to 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, direct-injection, 310 PS stock) with a HKS GT-SS turbo kit featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, HKS 260-lph fuel pump, and Tomei 850cc injectors for a target of 500 PS at 1.5 bar boost with E85 flex-fuel capability

Full bolt-on reinforcement with a TRD-sourced 2GR-FKS reinforced block, Kelford 272° camshafts, and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a Tomei N1 muffler and dual 3.5-inch outlets for optimized scavenging

Suspension overhaul using Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (part #DFV003) with custom valving for the Harrier Z’s 2,790mm wheelbase, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars and Whiteline adjustable end links for reduced body roll
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works Harrier Z-specific widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with carbon fiber overfenders and a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with red pinstriping

Custom front lip and rear diffuser from Vertex Lang (Harrier Z-specific fitment) in raw carbon fiber, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a functional vent for the 2GR-FKS intercooler piping

Wheel setup: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10 +18 front and 20x11 +25 rear with 265/30/20 and 295/25/20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors and Project Mu HC+ brake pads for track-ready stopping power
